implementation_summary: Focused fix for the dominant UI screenshot failure: avoid re-creating dense/cross-region DisplayDim lanes in the 006 long-thin top-view arrangement path and require this fix before no-COM rerun packet can allow a future real CAD rerun.

modified_files.reason: The latest 006 run used generator_display_dim_annotation_chain fallback and still produced an over-dense sheet. The fallback now anchors top-view candidate lanes to the dimension arrow/geometry position and skips candidates that would trigger reference-lane geometry issues.
modified_files.affects_other_samples: Limited to long_thin generator fallback layout behavior; non-long-thin drawings bypass the new candidate issue filter.
modified_files.rollback: Remove _reference_lane_issue_for_candidate usage and restore the previous first-valid candidate selection in the fallback arrange stage.

modified_files.reason: The main dimension arrange service now prefers candidate positions that do not create top-view cross-region side lanes, far lanes, or diagonal/cross-region leaders for 006-style long-thin drawings.
modified_files.affects_other_samples: Potentially affects other long_thin drawings by preferring local arrow-anchored lanes; existing long_thin arrange tests still pass.
modified_files.rollback: Remove the candidate issue filter and arrow-anchored top-view lane placement helper.

modified_files.reason: No-COM rerun packet must reject stale source that lacks the new candidate-level reference lane filter before any future real CAD rerun.
modified_files.affects_other_samples: No drawing generation behavior change; validation gate only.
modified_files.rollback: Remove the two candidate-filter signature keys if the lane-filter approach is reverted.

modified_files.reason: Offline regression proves a detected 006-style reference-lane geometry issue is eliminated after arrangement.
modified_files.rollback: Remove the added after-count assertions if the arrange fix is reverted.

modified_files.reason: Offline rerun packet validation now blocks when either generator fallback or dimension arrange source is missing the new 006 lane candidate filter.
modified_files.rollback: Remove these two tests if the packet signature gate is reverted.

next_step: Run Step 5 offline validation, then Step 6 no-COM SolidWorks readiness. Real CAD rerun remains forbidden unless readiness allows it.
